title: 6-Month Career Plan Template
when_to_use: After completing Beginner track to plan the path toward professional readiness

steps.title: Month 1-2: Intermediate Track
steps.instruction: Month 1-2: Complete OCH Intermediate Offensive Track
steps.tip: Build on beginner skills with hands-on exploitation. This is where theory becomes practice

steps.title: Month 3: CTF Competitions
steps.instruction: Month 3: Participate in 2+ CTF competitions (PicoCTF, TryHackMe)
steps.tip: CTFs build speed and creative thinking. Start with beginner-friendly platforms

steps.title: Month 4: Certification Prep
steps.tip: eJPT is the best entry-level cert for offensive security. It's practical and affordable

steps.title: Month 5: Practical Machines
steps.instruction: Month 5: Complete 10+ HackTheBox or VulnHub machines
steps.tip: Write up every machine you complete. These writeups become portfolio pieces

steps.title: Month 6: Portfolio Building
steps.instruction: Month 6: Build portfolio with 5 published writeups
steps.tip: Publish on your blog, Medium, or GitHub. Quality over quantity. One excellent writeup beats five rushed ones

steps.title: Ongoing Activities
steps.instruction: Ongoing: Contribute to community forums, attend local meetups
steps.tip: Community involvement builds network and reputation. Both are essential for career growth in Africa's cyber community

steps.title: Monthly Review
steps.instruction: Review and adjust plan at the end of each month
steps.tip: Plans change. Life happens. The key is to review, adjust, and keep moving forward. Consistency beats intensity
